title: phyla nodiflora var. canescens
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. canescens, also known as marsh fleabane or gray leaf loosestrife, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Phyla nodiflora var. canescens include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Phyla nodiflora var. canescens include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
